name: "Grandmaster" Greevil
description:
Greevil is the main antagonist of Pokemon XD. He serves as the founder(technically the "Grandmaster")of the criminal syndicate Cipher. While leading it, he hides his sinister motives in public under the guise of a rich entrepreneur named Mr. Verich while accompanied by his two bodyguards. His past is unknown or even how he founded the organization but the purpose for Cipher is total control using brute force with the shadow pokemon they create.

He is a very short elderly and bald old man garbed in purple cult-like robes and wearing glasses, he often has his eyes closed which hides his piercing yellow eyes.

As the leader of Cipher, his entire team consists of shadow pokemon most notably the three legendary birds of Kanto while also controlling Cipher's ultimate shadow pokemon, Lugia.
creator: AnimeMan1993
